item.title: State investigators issue final Camp Mystic report detailing cascading failures during July 4 flood
item.description: Lawmakers said they have already passed laws addressing all but one of the deficiencies the investigation found.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas college watchdog received nearly 70 complaints, opened one investigation, records show
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Where is screwworm in Texas? Track cases here.
item.dc:creator: Berenice Garcia

item.title: “Survival of the fittest”: Insiders say screwworm could improve the Texas cattle industry, beef
item.dc:creator: Stephen Simpson

item.title: U.S. Supreme Court unanimously sides with Texas man, rules it’s not a crime for marijuana users to have guns
item.description: Ali Danial Hemani successfully challenged a federal law prohibiting people who illegally use drugs from owning guns. Justices said that ban is a Second Amendment violation.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press

item.title: An old well began gushing oilfield wastewater in a West Texas church parking lot, sparking a costly cleanup
item.description: By the time the Texas Railroad Commission shut down nearby oilfield injection wells to control the leak, 1.5 million gallons of toxic wastewater had spilled to the surface.
item.dc:creator: Inside Climate News

item.title: The Texas GOP wants closed primaries. Here’s what that would mean for voters.
item.description: Gov. Greg Abbott and state party leaders want a Texas law allowing only registered Republicans to vote in GOP primaries.
item.dc:creator: Natalia Contreras

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.
